data.title: Add REPLAN_ESCALATE parsing branch to sprint Phase 3 Step 2
data.description:
Sprint SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2 (parse STATUS block, ~line 407-464) has no branch for when implementation-plan returns REPLAN_ESCALATE. The cascade-replan-protocol.md defines the behavior but it is not wired into Phase 3 STATUS parsing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] If skill output contains 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm', present the EXPLANATION to the user and ask for direction (route to brainstorm vs. proceed vs. abandon)
- [ ] Track replan cycle count against sprint.max_replan_cycles from dso-config.conf (default 2)
- [ ] On cycle cap hit, present last plan and ask for direction per cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] A RED test asserts the SKILL.md documents REPLAN_ESCALATE handling in Phase 3

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Phase 3 Step 2 parse STATUS block)
